title: Violin Teacher
description:
Violin Teacher (Full-Time) – Wolfgang Violin Studio

Join Our Teaching Team!

Founded in 2009, Wolfgang Violin Studio is a well-established and vibrant music academy in Singapore, specialising in Violin, Piano, and Cello education. We’re looking for a passionate, dedicated Violin teacher to join our team and inspire the next generation of young musicians.

Role & Responsibilities

You’ll work closely with our Head of Violin to deliver engaging and meaningful lessons across individual and group classes. From building strong technical foundations to guiding students through aural skills, theory, and graded exams, you’ll play a key role in each student’s musical journey. You’ll also contribute to our studio community through resource development, library upkeep, and active participation in teacher meetings and progress reviews.

Requirements

- Minimum 2 years of teaching experience

- ⁠Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Music

- ⁠Knowledge of ABRSM and/or Trinity College London syllabi

- ⁠Passionate about teaching children; with a cheerful and approachable personality

- ⁠Strong communication skills and fluency in English

What We Offer

- Competitive salary package, aligned with experience

- ⁠Paid annual leave and medical benefits

- ⁠Ongoing teacher training and mentorship

- ⁠Supportive, collaborative team culture with career growth opportunities

How to Apply

Please submit the following to HR@wolfgangviolin.com

- Cover letter with completed details via https://tinyurl.com/WolfgangHR

- ⁠CV with a recent photograph

- ⁠Contacts of two professional references

- ⁠Academic transcripts

Learn more about us at www.wolfgangviolin.com

postedCompany.description:
WOLFGANG MUSIC PTE. LTD.


Founded by Program Director Min Lee in 2009, Wolfgang Violin is named as a tribute to the world's most iconic and revered violin prodigy, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart. Conceived with the aim of redefining how classical music is taught to young minds, the lessons are specially designed to provide students with a holistic music education.


Our Vision
For every child, a life enriched  with the Gift of Music, that sparks creativity and imagination, driving innovation and progress.


Our Mission

Fulfill the promise of the Complete Music Education.

Empower every child learning an instrument with programs that emphasise technique as catalyst in bridging musical potential to expressive artistry.


Getting it Right! From the Start! 


A life long music journey.
